name: io.github.mishrasanjeev/agenticorg
description: AgenticOrg MCP server for AI agents, A2A discovery, SOP deploy, and MCP tool listing.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List AgenticOrg AI agents; optionally filter by domain.

tools.name: run_agent
tools.description: Run an AI agent by type using the AgenticOrg A2A task endpoint.

tools.name: get_agent_details
tools.description: Get agent config, scopes, tools, confidence floor, HITL conditions, and status.

tools.name: create_agent_from_sop
tools.description: Parse SOP text and generate a draft AI agent configuration.

tools.name: deploy_agent
tools.description: Deploy a reviewed agent configuration from SOP parsing or manual config.

tools.name: list_connectors
tools.description: List AgenticOrg native connectors and their status for discovery.

tools.name: list_mcp_tools
tools.description: List AgenticOrg agent tools exposed by the platform MCP API.

tools.name: discover_agents_a2a
tools.description: Discover available agent skills through the A2A protocol.

tools.name: get_agent_card
tools.description: Get the public A2A Agent Card for this AgenticOrg instance.

tools.name: seller.list_products
tools.description: List cached Seller Commerce Agent product snapshots with source and freshness metadata.

tools.name: seller.search_products
tools.description: Search cached Seller Commerce Agent product snapshots without transaction authority.

tools.name: seller.get_product_facts
tools.description: Answer product fact questions from cached Shopify-backed OACP artifacts.

tools.name: seller.get_offer_snapshot
tools.description: Return cached price and offer snapshot labels without creating price locks or checkout sessions.

tools.name: seller.get_inventory_snapshot
tools.description: Return cached inventory snapshot labels; inventory is a snapshot, not a reservation.

tools.name: seller.ask_product_question
tools.description: Ask buyer-safe product questions from cached artifacts; final commitments are refused.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICORG_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from your AgenticOrg dashboard (Settings > API Keys).
